CustomField.description: Per-line minimum NetUnitPrice after promo adjustments, sourced from Pricing_Matrix__c.Floor_Price__c by the Price Matrix pricing element. Read by the Apply Promotion Value formula (MAX(Floor_Price__c, NetUnitPrice - Promotion_Value__c)) and by PromoCodeAllocationEngine to cap per-line discount stacking. Null = no floor (effective floor of 0).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-populated from the Pricing Matrix entry. Read-only at the order level.
CustomField.label: Floor Price
